headline: J.M. Smucker looks to volume for growth as pricing power dips
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma and Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferre join Josh Lipton on Market Domination to analyze J.M. Smucker (SJM) stock ahead of the company's earnings report using Yahoo Finance's new research platform, Alphaspace

headline: Is Hershey Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Hershey has underperformed the Nasdaq over the past year, but analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
